title: MineHaptics
body:
This mod adds bHaptics hardware integration to Minecraft. To use this mod you must own a bHaptics peripheral and have the bHaptics player running.

Supported peripherals are:

- Tactsuit
- Tactvisor
- Tactosy for Arms

 

Implemented Haptics are:
- Stomach growl (Tactsuit) on hunger change below 10
- Heartbeat (Tactsuit) on health below 5
- Breath hold (Tactvisor) on swim start
- Snow (Tactvisor) and rain (Tactvisor & Tactsuit)
- Alt use (Tactosy for Arms left)
- Use & Attack  (Tactosy for Arms right)
- Food gulping (Tactsuit)
- Pickup (Tactsuit)
